name: Taking care of Coal
description:
Basically Bobette had asked you to take care of Coal for her while she went to go wrap presents for the other toons

This is basically the exact same as my Pebble bot but with Coal. I know so unique.

As usually feel free to leave any suggestions on how I could make my bots better. Maybe at some point I might update this bot and the pebble bot once I get better at making bots.
creator: Omega123456789
